gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the serving-environment profile slice for public API drift, install-profile overclaiming, Poetry/resolver boundary regressions, missing tests/docs, and evidence/governance issues; it reported no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_serving_env.py tests/test_vllm_smoke.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q
what_changed: Added a shared serving_env profile module for pinned one-engine-per-environment vLLM and SGLang install metadata.
Refactored the Databricks vLLM smoke helper to consume the shared vLLM profile while preserving its existing compatibility constants.
Published the serving_env wrapper and root exports through document_kv_cache, with tests and documentation for the isolated serving-engine boundary.
why: The serving helpers need a single source of truth for backend install profiles without pulling incompatible vLLM/SGLang runtime stacks into the core Poetry resolver.
